name: e2e
description: Vinylmania end-to-end tests (Playwright) — drives the real app through a browser against the Firebase Local Emulator Suite, with no real Google account required

scripts.test: node ../scripts/run-with-timeout.js 1080 -- npx firebase --config ../backend/firebase.json emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project vinylmania-test "playwright test"
